message:
🐛 Fix mode switching breaking all cached data dashboard cards (#765)

Register useCache hooks with registerRefetch() so triggerAllRefetches()
reaches them during mode transitions. Reset fetchingRef in
resetToInitialData() to prevent in-flight fetches from blocking new
ones. Remove redundant isDemoMode() guards from useCachedData fetchers
since useCache already prevents fetching in demo mode via
effectiveEnabled.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
